batch_summary.note: S-001: contempt threat cluster Nov 11-14 2022 (ROW-783/789/790/824/828). First documented financial coercion cluster. Lawyer retainer invoked. ARC-RF06-001 Signal 1.

messages.text: You gonna pay or do I file contempt?
You're in contempt at this point
You need to borrow off someone or something otherwise you'll be going back to court
You still haven't paid your half of daycare and swim which was due last Thursday. If I don't see payment soon I'll reach out to the lawyer. She's still on retainer
This isn't pay when you feel like it. Your ordered by the court to pay within 7 days

primary_flags.classification: RF-06 primary Sev-1 — First confirmed financial coercion cluster. Nov 11: immediate escalation to contempt threats ('You gonna pay or do I file contempt?' / 'You're in contempt at this point' / 'going back to court') for a daycare payment timing issue. Nov 14: lawyer-retainer leverage ('She's still on retainer'). This is the first documented contempt threat cluster in the text record. Note: Eli confirmed in CP2 that a contempt summons was actually filed June 3, 2022 (in B-001 date range) — the 'again' language in B-004 references that prior action. Per ADD-002. ARC-RF06-001 Signal 1.
primary_flags.addendum_applied: ADD-002 (child support court action — executed; contempt action confirmed by CP2). ADD-005 (payment leverage co-deployed with hostile messaging pattern).
